message:
🐛 Fix TTFI test live mode mocks causing React crash (#1090)

The catch-all API mock returned {"items":[]} for /api/dashboards,
but useDashboards expects an array. This caused "dashboards is not
iterable" crash in useSearchIndex, unmounting React entirely.

- Add /api/dashboards mock returning [] (array, not {items:[]})
- Mock api.github.com to prevent external request hangs
- Add RSS CORS proxy mocks (rss2json, allorigins, corsproxy)
- Change 127.0.0.1:8585 handler to return valid empty data (was 503)

Result: all 4 modes pass (174/174 cards, 0 timeouts, 58s total)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
